question: Compare completed-order revenue between 2024 and 2025: show each year and its revenue.

attempts.raw_response: {"sql": "SELECT strftime('%Y', o.order_date) AS year, ROUND(SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price), 2) AS revenue FROM orders AS o JOIN order_items AS oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id WHERE o.status = 'completed' GROUP BY year ORDER BY year", "assumptions": ["gold replay"], "selected_tables": []}

candidate.sql: SELECT strftime('%Y', o.order_date) AS year, ROUND(SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price), 2) AS revenue FROM orders AS o JOIN order_items AS oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id WHERE o.status = 'completed' GROUP BY year ORDER BY year

policy.normalized_sql: SELECT STRFTIME('%Y', o.order_date) AS year, ROUND(SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price), 2) AS revenue FROM orders AS o JOIN order_items AS oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id WHERE o.status = 'completed' GROUP BY year ORDER BY year LIMIT 200
